0.role: Senior Full Stack Developer & AI/ML Engineer
0.Description: • Hands-on technical consulting for Fortune 500 clients including [Adobe], [Fannie Mae], [Warner Bros Games], [Angel Studios], [The Cigna Group], and [NuSkin]—architecting [AI/ML] systems, full-stack applications, and data pipelines on the [AWS] platform. • Built production [RAG] pipelines using [LangChain] and [ChromaDB] for semantic search and retrieval-augmented generation, with prompt engineering, error analysis, and reliability controls. • Developed campaign asset automation system integrating [DALL-E 3] for programmatic social media ad generation with prompt engineering and quality controls. • Created "Flock of Postcards" sbecker11.github.io/flock-of-postcards—an interactive [JavaScript] visualization with 3D motion parallax, animated transitions, depth-of-field effects, and a data-driven [Excel]-to-[JS] content pipeline. 310 commits across 11 iterative versions. • Built Color Palette Maker github.com/sbecker11/color-palette-maker-react—a [React 19]/[Node.js]/[Python] app with a multi-stage [CV] pipeline: 5-strategy [OpenCV] region detection, region-masked [K-means clustering], and [CIEDE2000] perceptual color matching. Full test suite, [Dockerized], [CI/CD], with [Docker Compose] and [Kubernetes] migration plans. • [GitHub Actions] for automated end-to-end [CI/CD] pipelines; [AWS Glue] and [Apache Spark] for data cleansing, lineage tracking, and governance.

1.Description: • Refactored and extended legacy [Python]/[Django] [REST APIs] for [Adobe] global [SEO] platform, reducing technical debt and improving maintainability within the Data Analytics division. • Developed new [REST API] endpoints backed by [PostgreSQL] on [AWS Aurora], with comprehensive [Python] unit tests to ensure reliability and code coverage. • Built admin tooling to streamline [SEO] platform management workflows, collaborating with cross-functional product and analytics teams. • Coordinated with [Adobe] system security team to configure [AWS IAM] role access for development and testing of platform services.

2.employer: Fannie Mae / Risk Works Analysis Data Lake
2.Description: • Created [dbt]-validated [SQL] code for data cleansing and data lake ingestion using [AWS Redshift], [Glue], [Airflow], [S3], and [Lambda]. • Used [Amazon Glue] to track schema changes and revise [Redshift] external views; created custom views for analysis and reporting. • Utilized [Python] to consolidate multiple spreadsheets of industrial automation data into final, client-ready reports. • Documented processes to build, test, and deploy data pipeline components for in-house [ETL] framework.

3.Description: • Modernized apps via [Jenkins] [CI/CD] pipeline upgrade, integrating [SetupTools], [Artifactory]/[PyPI], [SonarQube], and [Xray]. • Created custom application generator producing templates with [Terraform] and pipeline-related files for new applications. • Engineered [Python] [REST API] integration enabling credential retrieval from [CyberArk's] identity management platform using mutual [SSL/TLS] authentication, reducing password rollover costs by 95%. • Investigated migration of legacy on-prem [ETL] pipeline components to serverless [AWS] cloud using [Kafka], [Airflow], and [FiveTran].

4.Description: • Integrated [Segment CDP] with user in-game telemetry, purchase history, and [Salesforce] profiles for unified customer identity resolution across marketing platforms. • Built segmented user population groupings for targeted advertising campaigns, with audience sharing to [Google Ads], [YouTube], and advertising partners. • Utilized [Python] to integrate with third-party marketing platforms using [REST APIs] and direct connections to [Google BigQuery], [AWS] services, [Salesforce], and [Snowflake]. • Created status dashboards using [DataDog] and [Amazon QuickSight]; implemented integrations with [Jenkins] and [ZenDesk].

5.Description: • Designed and deployed a production [CNN]-based video classification system using [PyTorch] on [AWS SageMaker] for automated content tagging, enabling a new revenue opportunity through frame-level categorization. • Conducted data exploration with [ML] algorithms using [Jupyter], [Python], [Pandas], [NumPy], [Scikit-Learn], and [Keras]; visualized results with [Amazon QuickSight] and [Plotly]. • Created [RESTful APIs] to exchange data with external e-commerce and advertising partners. • Developed business intelligence reports using [Looker] and [Tableau] with [Snowflake] and [Redshift] for sales and finance reporting.

6.Description: • Conducted advanced statistical exploration of real-estate sales data using [Python], [Pandas], [NumPy], [SciPy], and [Scikit-learn]. • Developed batch automation program transforming months of manual project duplication and text replacement into minutes. • Implemented [CI/CD] pipeline using [GitHub Actions] with [Coverage], [SonarQube], and [Xray]; used [Terraform] and [Helm] for environment management. • Managed [RESTful APIs] for data exchange with real-estate data teams and customers.

7.Description: • Redesigned and optimized site registration and login workflows by designing wireframes and collaborating with [UX] designers for improved conversion and usability. • Developed reusable [Vue.js]/[Vuetify] components with [Node.js] and [SCSS] for improved functionality; documented and launched new packages for company-wide use. • Internationalized web content and unified customer data using [Adobe Experience Cloud], [CDP], and [XDM] for personalized global user experiences.
7.label: NuSkin

8.Description: • Designed and deployed an [AWS] data pipeline for the [Vela] healthcare platform, providing messaging, communication, and collaboration tools for the healthcare industry. • Defined [RESTful APIs] for daily caregiver questionnaire submission and data retrieval through web applications. • Managed data ingress by queueing [API Gateway] messages via [Kinesis] streams, transforming to [Parquet] in [S3], and processing with [Apache Spark] on [EMR] for [Redshift] loading. • Ensured privacy and encryption standards for [PII], [PHI], [PCI], Patient Data, [FHIR], and [HL7], as well as [HIPAA] and [GDPR] compliance.

9.Description: • Spearheaded development of an [NLP]-based platform for user preference analysis from curated books, articles, websites, and quotes. • Used vectorization, eigenvector decomposition for dimensionality reduction, and [K-means] [Bayesian] clustering for collaborative filtering to find content and users with similar preferences. • Co-authored three patents for [NLP]-based recommendation systems using vector embeddings and cosine similarity.

10.Description:
• Founded boutique consulting firm serving clients in entertainment, medical services, manufacturing, insurance, and cybersecurity.
• Clients included [AMI], [Coca-Cola Corp.], [Medical Services Corp.], and [Intrusic Cyber Security]. 
• Identified profitable opportunities in product development and software engineering; negotiated budgets and milestones with C-level management. 
• Architected full-internet and low-bandwidth cache-and-sync [IoT] solutions for enterprise systems with mobile devices.
